title: OpenSSL TLS handshake buffer overflow fix
apply_cmd: sudo apt update && sudo apt install openssl=3.0.9 -y
notes: Requires service restart after update. Backup config under /etc/ssl before upgrading.

title: ExampleApp input validation hotfix
rollback_cmd: sudo systemctl stop exampleapp && sudo cp /opt/exampleapp/backup/* /opt/exampleapp/ && sudo systemctl start exampleapp
notes: Stop service before applying; perform backup of /opt/exampleapp.
